src: They liked to keep tabs on you even then .
mt: Atunci, îi plăcea să te urmărească.

src: And what happens when one generation of whiz-kids runs out of steam and needs to be replaced ?
mt: És mi történik, amikor egy generáció a whiz-kids kifogyik a gőzükből, és kell helyettesíteni őket?

src: If they equate punishment with physical punishment , I can see their point and would generally agree with them ( although most parents would feel that such a proposition is very difficult to apply ) .
mt: Jika mereka mengaitkan hukuman dengan hukuman fizikal, saya dapat melihat sudut pandangan mereka dan secara amnya bersetuju dengan mereka ( walaupun kebanyakan ibu bapa akan merasakan bahawa cadangan tersebut sangat sukar untuk diterapkan ) .

src: She had seen his point of view and expressed it even better than he did .
mt: Ég hafði séð sjónarmið hans og tjáð það enn betur en hann gerði.

src: If the military really believes in the justification of its exclusive stance , then let it stick to its guns and prosecute me for my actions .
mt: Jika militer benar-benar percaya pada alasan sikap eksklusifnya, maka biarkan mereka bertahan dengan senjata mereka dan menuntut saya atas tindakan saya.

src: And there was great admiration for Livingstone 's transparent honesty , self-effacing modesty and determination to stick to his guns .
mt: Ég varð mjög hrifinn af Livingstone fyrir skýrni hans í samskiptum, sjálfstæði og ákveðni í að halda áfram með það sem hann hafði ákveðið.

src: If someone from Faraj comes to blows with someone from Fadhil , all the members of the groups descended from Muhammad should unite against all those descended from Mahmud .
mt: Jika ada orang dari Faraj yang bertengkar dengan orang dari Fadhil, maka semua anggota kelompok-kelompok yang berasal dari Muhammad harus bersatu melawan semua orang yang berasal dari Mahmud.

src: If something 's a life-saver for medical use , then we will consider the transgenic animal route .
mt: Jika sesuatu itu adalah penyelamat nyawa untuk penggunaan perubatan, maka kita akan mempertimbangkan laluan haiwan transgenik.

src: Gets on me nerves . ’
mt: Ég er orðinn þreyttur á þessu.

src: If peasants could get out of hand when the government was trying to raise a militia , it was not unreasonable to suppose that they would run amok on learning what the government meant by freedom .
mt: Jika petani dapat keluar dari kendali ketika pemerintah mencoba untuk membangun milisi, tidak tidak masuk akal untuk mengira bahwa mereka akan berantakan ketika mereka belajar apa yang pemerintah maksud dengan kebebasan.

src: Professor John Ashworth , vice-chairman of the committee of vice-chancellors and principals ( CVCP ) , also urged Mr MacGregor to use ‘ a heaven-sent opportunity to go back to the drawing board and look at the entire issue of how students are supported — grants , loans and fees . ’
VID_candidate: go back to [ pron ] drawing board
mt: Prófessor John Ashworth , varaformaður nefndar varaforseta og stjórnenda ( CVCP ) , hvatti einnig MacGregor til að nýta "himneskt tækifæri til að fara aftur í teikningar og skoða allt málið um stuðning nemenda - styrkir , lán og gjöld . "

src: I note that the Opposition 's tax plans have gone back to the drawing board ; after five years of careful preparation , they have been ditched in a period of five weeks .
VID_candidate: go back to [ pron ] drawing board
mt: Ég athuga að andstæðingarnir hafa tekið skattaráætlunum sínum aftur til teikningarborðs; eftir fimm ára undirbúning hafa þeir verið hættir á fimm vikum.

src: It is er as I see it they have gone back to the drawing board with where the bands are actually how it 's banded .
VID_candidate: go back to [ pron ] drawing board
mt: Ég held að þeir hafi farið aftur til teikningabrettið með þar sem bandanna eru í raun hvernig það er banded.

src: Hosanna could see it too , and would prick up his ears as he sat on her lap and focus on Gabriel moving around by the sink or fixing the green curtains at the window .
mt: Hoşana bunu da görebiliyordu, ve onun dizinde otururken kulaklarını dikti ve banyo civarında Gabriel'in hareketlerini veya pencerenin yeşil perdelerini düzeltmesini izledi.

src: That was the style of it , they could not see , could not make up their own mind .
mt: Ég var stíll þess, þeir gátu ekki séð, gátu ekki tekið ákvörðun.

src: And if we 're offering you your passage home , you and the children , and help in finding your feet once you get there , and a good convent school for the girls , so that they can go straight on with the nuns and will not really notice any difference , well , all that 's to be regarded as a loan , which we 're very glad to offer you for an extended period , in the hopes of getting you back among caring people . "
mt: És ha ajánlunk neked a hazatérésedet, te és a gyerekek, valamint segítséget a talajra állásodban, és egy jó apátsági iskolát a lányoknak, hogy a nővérekkel együtt folytathassák tanulmányaikat, és nem érzékelhetik a változást, akkor ez mind egy kölcsön lenne, amit nagyon örülünk, hogy hosszabb időre kínálunk, remélve, hogy visszatérhetsz a gondoskodó emberek közé.

src: Broke up with my wife years back .
mt: Ég skildi með konu mína fyrir mörgum árum.

src: Do not take her breath away .
mt: Ne prenesi njenega diha.

src: Keeping the hands warm keeps the condition at bay .
mt: Rakstot rokās siltu palīdz saglabāt stāvokli.

src: Keeping the opposition at bay
mt: Rakibin opozisyonu tutmaq.

src: Keeping cool at the Excelsior
mt: Rămânând răcoros la Excelsior.

src: If the front rabbit sits tight and declines to budge there is no way the others can move .
mt: Jika arnab depan duduk teguh dan enggan bergerak, maka tiada cara bagi arnab-arnab lain untuk bergerak.

src: The Turkish people are sitting tight , watching the skies and CNN .
mt: Turkler gökyüzünü ve CNN'yi izleyerek sabırla bekliyorlar.

src: If Mr Benn is voted out it will reinforce Labour 's belief in wider use of ballots , rather than having polls stitched up by local activists .
mt: Jika Mr Benn diundi keluar, ini akan menguatkan keyakinan Labour dalam penggunaan lebih banyak undi, bukannya membolehkan pilihan raya dipersendakan oleh aktivis tempatan.

src: Just to learn the way to say ‘ get lost’
mt: Just to learn the way to say ‘ get lost’ in tr. is: "Sadece kaybolmak nasıl söylenir öğrenmek için".

src: I was 22 or 23 before I decided to tread the boards .
mt: Ég var 22 eða 23 árum þegar ég ákvað að ganga á borðin.

src: This was disappointing for all and sundry , except for the Durham players , who achieved records by virtue of their newly - acquired first - class status .
mt: Toate au fost dezamăgiţi, cu excepţia jucătorilor din Durham, care au obţinut recorduri datorită noilor lor statut de prima clasă.

src: True to form the odd couple had differing views on the subject .
mt: Vraćajući se na formu, neobični par je imao različite mišljenje o temi.

src: If we are to get a common transport market genuinely up and running , it is important that we should not only have regulations but that these regulations should also , as far as possible , apply to every country .
mt: Jika kita ingin memastikan pasar transportasi yang umum berjalan dengan baik, penting bahwa kita tidak hanya memiliki peraturan, tetapi juga bahwa peraturan-peraturan tersebut, sejauh mungkin, berlaku untuk semua negara.

src: He must , he must get so pissed off with that must n't he ?
mt: Ég verð að vera reiður, hann verður að vera reiður, ekki satt?

src: She had never been brought face to face with her great - uncle , and never devoted any conscious thought to him .
mt: Ég hafði aldrei verið sett fram til andlit hennar mikla - frænda og aldrei eytt neinn meðvitaður hugsun um hann.

src: If you do n't hear the sound of the drives spinning up to speed then one of the connectors is the wrong way round .
mt: Jika Anda tidak mendengar suara dari drive berputar dengan kecepatan maka salah satu konektor terbalik.

src: And she said I wondered if you could do me a favour .
mt: És azt mondta, hogy érdeklődtem volna, hogy segíthetne-e nekem.

src: I have no doubt that , as with any new tax , there will be teething troubles , indeed we still await necessary regulations to complete our preparations , but our aim is to ensure a high percentage of accurate bills going out in April and to minimise the difficulties at the outset.’
mt: Ég hef enga vafa um að, eins og með hvaða nýjan skatt sem er, munu vera teething vandamál, því að við bíðum ennþá eftir nauðsynlegum reglugerðum til að ljúka undirbúningnum, en markmið okkar er að tryggja að hár hlutfall nákvæmra reikninga sé send út í apríl og að minnka erfiðleikana í upphafi.

src: They spend all they have to keep up appearances .
mt: Ég eyða öllu sem ég á til að halda upp ásýnd.

src: Several examples come to mind here .
mt: Beberapa contoh dapat dikemukakan di sini.

src: With his friend , Robert Smithers , he determines to ‘ make a night of it’ after receipt of his quarter 's wages ; their riotous behaviour leads to their arrest and appearance before a magistrate the following morning .
mt: Robert Smithers, onun arkadaşıyla birlikte, çeyrek maaşını aldıktan sonra "bir gece geçirmek" kararına varır; onların şenlik davranışları, onların tutuklanmasına ve bir mahkeme huzurunda sabahın erken saatlerinde görünmesine yol açar. .

src: Their problems all hit the headlines .
mt: Problemele lor au ajuns pe primele pagini ale ziarelor.

src: So I would be best to lay lay down the law straight away , what we needed , and what we did n't need .
mt: Jadi saya akan menjadi terbaik untuk meletakkan undang-undang lurus segera, apa yang kita perlukan, dan apa yang kita tidak perlukan.

src: If the development of HDMAC and Divine continues on schedule , they are likely to make an impact on the market at around the same time , probably making HDMAC redundant from the word go .
mt: Jika perkembangan HDMAC dan Divine berjalan sesuai jadwal, mereka mungkin akan membuat dampak di pasar pada waktu yang sama, membuat HDMAC tidak relevan dari awal.

src: So I 'm wondering if you could possibly lend a hand.’
mt: Jadi saya bertanya-tanya jika anda mungkin dapat membantu saya.

src: I understand it 's run into some difficulty but I urge the minister to press the commission to get a move on because this this is a problem that does n't just affect this country , it is certainly a problem that affects the whole of Europe and the European union in particular but also the the er the whole of the world and it 's something that needs international action .
mt: Ég skil að það hefur komið fram nokkrar erfiðleikar en ég hvatt þjóðverjum til að ýta á framkvæmdastjórnina til að fá þetta í gang vegna þess að þetta er ekki bara vandamál í þessari landi heldur er það vandamál sem hefur áhrif á alla Evrópu og Evrópusambandið sérstaklega en einnig heiminn og það þarf alþjóðlegt aðgerðir.

src: If you do anything of that sort to get a reaction , I will give you your marching orders’.’
mt: Jika Anda melakukan hal seperti itu untuk mendapatkan reaksi, saya akan memberikan Anda perintah mundur.”

src: She would have had every reason to look the other way .
mt: Ég hefði haft alla ástæðu til að horfa í annað horn.

src: And the side that drew against Barnet last Saturday , could be the one to do the trick .
mt: És az oldal, amelyik Barnet ellen küzdött utolsó szombat, lehet az egyik, hogy megcsinálja a trükköt.
